overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence through a narrow rocky canyon, rendered in a game engine with atmospheric mist and overcast lighting. The camera moves steadily forward along a dirt path between steep cliff walls, transitioning from dry terrain to wet ground with puddles. The environment features sparse vegetation and layered sedimentary rock formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon passage with steep rock walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow canyon passage between tall rock walls

entered.detail: tall steep rock wall with layered sedimentary texture forming the left side of the canyon
tall steep rock wall with vertical striations forming the right side of the canyon
dry dirt and gravel trail winding through the canyon floor
narrow strip of overcast sky visible between the high canyon walls
sparse tufts of dry yellow-brown grass growing along the canyon edges

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, misty canyon with steep rock walls rising on both sides. The camera moves forward along a dry dirt path with sparse patches of dry grass, while a thin strip of overcast sky is visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: wider canyon area with rock debris slopes

events.description: canyon widens significantly revealing more sky and a large rock debris slope on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing through the canyon as the walls open up and the path widens

entered.detail: large pile of loose rocks and scree accumulated at the base of the left canyon wall
denser green vegetation growing in the wider section of the canyon

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens into a wider area with more sky visible overhead. A prominent rock debris slope appears on the left side, and the vegetation becomes greener and more abundant. The canyon walls recede to the mid-distance as the path continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon section with wet ground and puddles

events.description: ground becomes visibly wet with dark mud and reflective puddles covering the path

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrower section of the canyon with wet ground underfoot

entered.detail: dark wet mud and gravel with visible puddles reflecting the sky
accumulation of loose stones and small rocks along the right canyon base

segments.scene_description: The canyon narrows again with the walls closing in on both sides. The ground becomes wet and muddy with visible puddles reflecting the overcast sky. The path continues through the darker, more enclosed section with loose rock scree visible on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a rocky canyon that shifts from a dry, misty corridor into a wider basin before closing back into a damp, enclosed gorge. It begins along a dry dirt path flanked by steep walls and sparse grass under a thin strip of overcast sky. As the camera advances, the canyon opens into a broader expanse where the walls recede, revealing a prominent debris slope on the left and more abundant green vegetation. The scene then shifts as the walls close in once more, narrowing the perspective and transforming the terrain into a wet, muddy path. Finally, the camera moves through this darker section, passing loose rock scree on the right while puddles on the ground reflect the gray sky above.
